docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AANERUD, RYAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, RYAN AANERUD, APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH MILLER. PLAINTIFF'S EXHBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-06-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE $50.00) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) SERVED SEP-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JOSEPH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JOSEPH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,620.00 FILED BY AANERUD, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY AANERUD, RYAN MILLER, JOSEPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AANERUD, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, JOSEPH $4,279.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,404.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
